milestones.title: Found First City
milestones.description: Found Capital: The player moves the Settler to the recommended spot and establishes the first city, 'Ra-Kedet', marking the beginning of the civilization.

milestones.title: Select First Technology
milestones.description: Technology Research: The player opens the technology tree and selects 'Mining' as the first research project to unlock resource harvesting capabilities.

milestones.title: Tribal Village Discovery
milestones.description: Exploration Reward: The player's Warrior unit enters a Tribal Village (Goody Hut) and receives a free Scout unit, significantly boosting early exploration.

milestones.title: Meet Rival Civilization
milestones.description: Diplomatic Contact: The player encounters the scout of a rival civilization (Egypt/Cleopatra) for the first time, initiating diplomatic relations.

milestones.title: Discover Natural Wonder
milestones.description: Exploration Discovery: The scout discovers the 'Eye of the Sahara' natural wonder, providing Era Score and astrology boost.

milestones.title: Found Second City
milestones.description: Expansion: The player uses a newly produced Settler to found the second city, 'Shedet', expanding the empire's territory and production capacity.

milestones.title: Place Campus District
milestones.description: City Planning: The player places a Campus district in a location adjacent to mountains to secure a +2 Science adjacency bonus.

milestones.title: Optimize Military Policy
milestones.description: Policy Change: In the Government screen, the player slots the 'Agoge' policy card to gain +50% production toward melee and ranged units, preparing for war.

milestones.title: Declare Surprise War
milestones.description: Declaration of War: The player formally declares a 'Surprise War' on the rival civilization to seize a strategic opportunity.

milestones.title: Capture Enemy Settler
milestones.description: Tactical Advantage: Immediately after declaring war, the player uses a Warrior to capture an undefended enemy Settler, effectively stealing a city's worth of production.

milestones.title: Found City with Captured Unit
milestones.description: Immediate Expansion: The player uses the captured Settler to immediately found a third city on the spot, turning the enemy's loss into an instant gain.

milestones.title: Capture Capital & Victory
milestones.description: Domination Victory: The player's forces successfully siege and capture the enemy capital, eliminating the rival civilization and triggering the Domination Victory cinematic.
